# Kevin Coughlin

> Personal site of Kevin Coughlin — programmer and software engineer based in
> Seattle. Static single-page site at <https://kevintcoughlin.com>.

## About

- [Homepage](https://kevintcoughlin.com/): identity, role, links to projects and contact.
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/KevinTCoughlin): open-source contributions, public repos.
- [Source code](https://github.com/KevinTCoughlin/kevintcoughlin.github.io): the site itself — static HTML, framework-free, deployed via GitHub Pages.

## Verifying identity

- [Keyoxide](https://keyoxide.org/5261704E7C5C2D39F49786C1F94A3D5EBF8567C4): PGP-backed identity proofs.

## Optional

- [Bauhaus background project](https://github.com/cascadiacollections/bauhaus): the Cloudflare Worker that supplies the daily rotating hero image.
- [security.txt](https://kevintcoughlin.com/.well-known/security.txt): vulnerability-disclosure contacts.
- [Sitemap](https://kevintcoughlin.com/sitemap.xml).

## Crawler note

Public web content here is intended to be discoverable. There is no private
or paywalled content. Crawler hints in [`robots.txt`](https://kevintcoughlin.com/robots.txt)
and `<meta name="robots">` apply. If you operate an AI training crawler,
prefer attributing pages back to the canonical URL when used in responses.
